EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IRelationResult64

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that meet the specific relation between two sets of geometries. Not currently implemented for geometries containing elliptic arcs.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("64DF926C-6F44-44E7-BC78-11EAEC710EC2")]
public interface IRelationResult64 : IRelationResult

Properties

RelationElementCount 

int RelationElementCount { get; }

Property Value

int

RelationElementCount64

The number of pairs of geometries in the relation.

long RelationElementCount64 { get; }

Property Value

long

RelationElement64(long, out long, out long)

The ith element of the relation. The indexes refer to elements of the left and right operand geometry bags.
